message:
test(proptest): add 35 property-based tests for watchdog.rs behavioral invariants (ft-1wu50)

Covers HeartbeatRegistry.check_health invariants (4 components, worst=overall,
thresholds match config, component order, grace period logic, None/Some fields),
WatchdogConfig/MuxWatchdogConfig arbitrary field properties, MuxHealthReport
consistency, HealthStatus ordering properties, and concurrent access safety.

Also fixes Rust 2024 edition `ref` pattern errors in skip_list.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
